keyFiles.index.html: Entry point - canvas, CSS scaling, script loading
keyFiles.src/constants.js: Game constants, tile IDs, physics values, design spec colors
keyFiles.src/level.js: Test level 120x20, tile data, moving platforms
keyFiles.src/physics.js: AABB collision, gravity, terminal velocity, one-way platforms
keyFiles.src/camera.js: Smooth follow, vertical dead zone, parallax generation
keyFiles.src/renderer.js: Canvas drawing: parallax, tiles, platforms, player
keyFiles.src/player.js: Player entity: movement, jump, damage, respawn
